analysis: The project appears to be a documentation website with a focus on black holes, as indicated by the event.json file. The current UI files (docs/index.html, docs/styles.css, docs/script.js) need to be updated to reflect a black hole theme with animated objects and slides. The existing to-dos suggest that the CSS and HTML files are incomplete and need to be enhanced with a dark, cosmic theme, animations for black hole visuals, and interactive elements. The JavaScript file also needs to be updated to ensure all functions are properly implemented.

improvements.description: Complete the CSS file with a dark, cosmic theme including animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements. Ensure the CSS file includes all necessary styles for the black hole theme, animations, and interactive elements.

Complete the HTML content to ensure all sections are properly included, such as the main content area with interactive planets, animated slides, and other sections related to black holes. Add a mobile-friendly navigation menu with a hamburger icon for better usability on mobile devices.
Complete the JavaScript content to ensure all functions are properly implemented, including event listeners and functionality for interactive elements.
